steps.t: Jal Vârsha can be found along the northern Rammas in southern Talath Anor. You should free their horses.
Jal Vârsha can be found along the the northern Rammas in southern Talath Anor. Now that their horses are gone, you should burn their tents.
Ingold can be found at the northern gate of the Rammas. You should speak with Ingold.
